title: Open Balancing Platform (OBP) - Non-BM Physical Notifications (PN)
description: NESO publishes Non-BM Physical Notifications (PN) data declared by Service Providers to Open Balancing Platform (OBP) system. This information is continuously published throughout the day on this platform. As of today, this page hosts Non-BM Quick Reserve Service PN data, and non-BM Slow Reserve & non-BM Dynamic Response PN data will be added here as the services goes live/cut-over. Additional transparency data for Non-BM Reserve services mastered by OBP can be found in Non-BM Instructions and Non-BM Reserve Availability and Utilisation price .
